basic_info.name: Fuli Bay (Fuli Wan) / 陵水富力灣 (within Xiangshui Bay / 香水灣)
basic_info.location: Fuli Bay, Yunhaige (云海阁), Guangpo Town (光坡镇), Lingshui Li Autonomous County, Hainan Province, China; located within the larger Xiangshui Bay (Perfume Bay) tourism resort area; ~90 km / 1.5 hr drive northeast of Sanya Phoenix International Airport, ~20 min by high-speed rail to Lingshui Station
basic_info.operator: Natural surf zone fronting the R&F Group (富力集团) Fuli Bay resort development (3,200-mu / ~213 ha integrated resort with Marriott Resort Xiangshui Bay anchor); local surf operators include Hang5 Surf School (the first ASI-accredited surf school in China) and the on-site Xiangshui Bay Marriott surf shop

technical_specs.pool_size: Natural bay; Fuli Bay sits inside the broader Xiangshui Bay coastline (roughly 6 km of beach), with four distinct surf zones / peaks identified along the Fuli Bay shoreline catering to different ability levels [uncertain]
technical_specs.wave_height: Seasonal average 0.5-1.8 m; winter NE monsoon peaks (Nov-Mar) deliver the largest, most organized sets up to ~2 m; summer SE swells (Mar-Oct) typically 0.4-1.2 m and gentler
technical_specs.wave_height_adjustability: Not adjustable (natural ocean swell driven by NE winter monsoon and SE summer monsoon, with occasional typhoon groundswell)
technical_specs.wave_types: Mix of mellow beach break (sandy bottom, gentle slope) for beginners and a left point setup on the headland for intermediate-to-advanced surfers; described as having four peaks of varying difficulty within the bay
technical_specs.wave_count_per_set: N/A (natural ocean sets, typically 3-6 waves per set with 8-14 second intervals depending on swell period) [uncertain]
technical_specs.session_length: N/A (open ocean access; surf school lessons typically 90-120 minutes)
technical_specs.stance_rotation_schedule: N/A (natural break; left point favors goofy frontside, beach break peaks work for both stances)
technical_specs.wave_type_classification: Beach break with adjacent left point break; sandy bottom with gentle gradient makes it one of Hainan's most beginner-tolerant natural spots while still offering quality lines for intermediates

pricing_sessions.price_range: Free open-ocean access; beginner surf lessons at Hang5 and Marriott surf shop typically 380-580 RMB per person (2 hr group, includes board, rashguard, leash); private lessons ~600-900 RMB [uncertain]
pricing_sessions.session_skill_tiers: Hang5 offers Surf Wise certificate progression (Beginner / Improver / Intermediate); group beginner ~380-500 RMB, private 1-on-1 ~600-900 RMB, multi-day camps and ASI-aligned certificate courses on request [uncertain]
pricing_sessions.equipment_rental: Soft-top board rental ~80-150 RMB per session or ~200-300 RMB per day; rashguards ~30-50 RMB; leash typically included with board hire [uncertain]
pricing_sessions.coaching_fee: Group lesson 380-500 RMB per person (2 hr); private 1-on-1 ~600-900 RMB; ASI Level 1 certified instructors available at Hang5 [uncertain]
pricing_sessions.coaching_packages: Multi-day surf camps and Surf Wise certificate packages offered by Hang5 (pricing on request); team-building and corporate programs available; Marriott in-house surf packages bundled with rooms [uncertain]
pricing_sessions.membership_program: 10-session punch cards offered by some local clubs (~2,000-3,000 RMB range); no formal bay-wide membership [uncertain]
pricing_sessions.corporate_team_building: Yes - Hang5 explicitly offers team-building programs; Marriott Resort Xiangshui Bay has 14 event rooms and outdoor spaces and bundles surf-themed corporate experiences; minimum group typically 10+ people [uncertain]

experience_guide.best_season: Year-round surfable; winter (Nov-Mar) is the prime season with consistent NE monsoon swell; summer (Jun-Sep) is one of the best summer surf options in Hainan thanks to SE monsoon and occasional typhoon swell
experience_guide.best_swell_window: Nov-Mar: NE monsoon swells 0.8-2 m, period 7-12 s, offshore W-NW winds; Jun-Sep secondary window with SE swells 0.5-1.2 m and possible typhoon groundswell
experience_guide.crowd_level: Low to moderate; described in Chinese surf media as having a 'wide tolerance zone with very few people' even during winter big-wave days; significantly less crowded than Wanning Riyue Bay or Sanya Houhai
experience_guide.booking_method: Walk-in at the on-site Hang5 Surf School and Marriott surf shop; advance booking via WeChat mini-programs of individual operators, Dianping (大眾點評), Meituan (美團), or through Marriott Resort Xiangshui Bay concierge
experience_guide.booking_platform: Dianping (大眾點評), Meituan (美團), WeChat mini-programs (Hang5 official account), Marriott Bonvoy / Trip.com / Ctrip (攜程) for hotel-bundled surf packages, Xiaohongshu (小紅書) DM for guesthouse-based clubs
experience_guide.payment_options: WeChat Pay and Alipay universally accepted; cash widely accepted; international credit cards accepted at the Marriott resort but rarely at independent surf shops
experience_guide.skill_required: All levels - beginner-friendly inside zones with gentle sand-bottom waves, plus intermediate/advanced peaks at the point; recognized as one of the best Hainan spots for first-timers seeking uncrowded waves
experience_guide.age_eligibility: Hang5 and most clubs accept ages 6+; participants must be able to swim; no formal upper age limit but lessons subject to instructor discretion based on fitness [uncertain]
experience_guide.child_friendly_score: 4/5 - gentle beach gradient, soft-top boards, kids' programs at Hang5; on-site Marriott family facilities; uncrowded lineup reduces collision risk
experience_guide.sup_paddleboard_offering: Yes - SUP rentals and lessons available via the Marriott water sports desk and local operators
experience_guide.photography_video_service: Photo/video service offered by clubs; typical pricing 100-300 RMB for session photos, 300-580 RMB for edited video [uncertain]
experience_guide.language_support: Limited English at most local clubs; Hang5 offers some English-capable instruction (founder is ASI-certified and ASI materials are bilingual); Marriott Resort staff speak English; Mandarin dominant elsewhere
experience_guide.accessibility_for_disabled: No formal adaptive surfing program advertised; Marriott Resort itself has wheelchair-accessible facilities; beach access is sandy [uncertain]
experience_guide.stance_preference_input: Not required when booking; both stances accommodated (beach break peaks suit both, point favors goofy frontside)
experience_guide.safety_notes: Generally calm with gentle gradient; lifeguards present at Marriott beach section but not full bay; ISA / ASI certified coaches available at Hang5; surf insurance recommended; watch for stronger rips during winter big-swell days
experience_guide.events_competitions_calendar: Used as auxiliary national-team training zone; no major WSL/ISA championship events currently scheduled at Fuli Bay (those remain centered at Wanning Riyue Bay) [uncertain]

surroundings.nearby_accommodation: Within the Xiangshui Bay resort cluster: Marriott Resort & Spa Xiangshui Bay (~800-2,000 RMB), Holiday Inn Xiangshui Bay (~600-1,200 RMB), Summer Surfing Resort / Crand Rezen Hotel & Resort (~500-1,000 RMB), Sheraton Shenzhou Peninsula nearby; Hang5 school apartments 200-300 RMB; nearby guesthouses 150-500 RMB
surroundings.on_site_accommodation: Marriott Resort & Spa Xiangshui Bay sits directly behind the Fuli Bay surf zone (north beach surfable from the resort grounds); Hang5 Surf School operates apartments at 200-300 RMB/night including community gym, pool, cinema and sports court access [uncertain pricing]
surroundings.nearby_food: Marriott resort restaurants (Asian, international, all-day dining), Xiangshui Bay commercial street (~25,000 m2 retail strip planned/operating with seafood, Hainanese local fare, cafes), nearby Yingzhou Old Street seafood stalls; per-person spend 50-300 RMB depending on venue
surroundings.transport: Self-drive via G98 East Ring Highway (Lingshui exit); high-speed rail to Lingshui Station then ~20 min taxi/Didi; Didi/online cars and local taxis readily available; resort shuttle from Marriott to nearby attractions
surroundings.transport_to_nearest_airport: ~90 km / ~1.5 hr drive from Sanya Phoenix International Airport (SYX) via G98; ~20 min by high-speed rail from Lingshui Station (~10 km from Fuli Bay) connecting to Sanya in ~30 min and Haikou in ~2 hr
surroundings.combined_itinerary: Common 3-5 day itinerary: Fuli Bay surf + Fenjiezhou Island (分界洲島) snorkeling/diving + Nanwan Monkey Island (南灣猴島) + Xiangshui Bay beach + Wuzhizhou Island day trip; pairs naturally with a Wanning Riyue Bay surf extension (~50 km north)

pros: Recognized in Chinese surf community as 'the best surf spot inside Xiangshui Bay' with very low crowd levels
Year-round surfable with strong summer wave window - one of Hainan's best summer options when Wanning is flat
Very beginner-friendly sandy gradient with adjacent intermediate point peaks for progression
Premium accommodation directly on the wave (Marriott Resort & Spa Xiangshui Bay walk to beach)
First ASI-accredited surf school in China (Hang5) offers internationally recognized instruction
cons: Less developed surf-village infrastructure than Wanning Riyue Bay or Sanya Houhai (fewer shops, bars, surfer cafes)
Travel time from Sanya airport ~1.5 hr discourages short trips
Limited English support outside the Marriott and Hang5
Wave size in summer can be small - not ideal for advanced surfers seeking power
Resort/private-development feel may not appeal to surfers seeking authentic surf-village vibe
reviews_reputation.user_reviews: Xiaohongshu (小紅書) and Zhihu (知乎) surf guides consistently rank Fuli Bay as a 'hidden gem' alternative to Riyue Bay - praised for uncrowded peaks, clean water, and beginner-friendly sandbar; Marriott Resort Xiangshui Bay holds ~4.5/5 on Trip.com / Ctrip; Hang5 Surf School positively reviewed on Dianping for instructor quality [uncertain ratings]
reviews_reputation.recommended_for: Beginners seeking uncrowded learning conditions; intermediate surfers wanting quality lines without Riyue crowds; families combining luxury resort stay with surf lessons; couples; corporate team-building groups
reviews_reputation.operator_brand_partnership: R&F Group (富力集团) developed the 3,200-mu Fuli Bay integrated resort with Marriott International (Marriott Resort & Spa Xiangshui Bay); surf instruction by Hang5 Surf School (ASI / Academy of Surfing Instructors international accreditation - first in China)
